Functions for handling the addition and removal of Bluetooth bonding in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C source code file defines two functions related to Bluetooth bonding management. The function [`bt_driver_handle_host_added_bonding`](<#bt_driver_handle_host_added_bonding>) is intended to handle events when a new Bluetooth bonding is added by the host. Similarly, the function [`bt_driver_handle_host_removed_bonding`](<#bt_driver_handle_host_removed_bonding>) is designed to manage events when an existing Bluetooth bonding is removed by the host. Both functions take a pointer to a `BleBonding` structure as a parameter, which likely contains information about the Bluetooth bonding. The file includes headers `bluetooth/bonding_sync.h` and `bluetooth/sm_types.h`, which suggests dependencies on Bluetooth bonding synchronization and security manager types.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `bluetooth/bonding_sync.h`
- `bluetooth/sm_types.h`
